calendar.matters:
Petition By Trustee For Construction Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Janice Lawrence and Maria Beckham appearing for trustee, John Hooper. No opposition to the operation of the formula. Court is not approving the execution of a new or fresh start trust document. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Pargaraph 3 of the order is striken. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
